resources.string: Bienvenido al Sistema de Deteccion de Incendios
Monitoreando riesgo de incendio en tiempo real
Resultado: Riesgo alto detectado a las %1$s
No se encontro app de telefono en este dispositivo.
Credenciales invalidas. Registrate si eres nuevo usuario.
Este correo ya esta registrado. Inicia sesion.
La sesión ha expirado. Inicia sesión nuevamente.
Cómo ayudar a usuarios en este sistema
Revisa el estado del panel y el nivel de humo para entender el riesgo.
Usa Alertas en Tiempo Real para confirmar las últimas actualizaciones de incendio.
Usa Llamada de Emergencia de inmediato cuando el estado indique riesgo de incendio.
Guía al usuario para mantener internet activo y recibir actualizaciones a tiempo.
Para soporte al usuario, registra el problema, toma una captura de la alerta y contacta al administrador del sistema o al equipo de seguridad con hora y datos del dispositivo.

Welcome to Fire Detection System

Welcome to the Fire Detection System application. This app helps you monitor smoke, flame, and temperature levels in real time and provides instant alerts whenever a fire risk is detected.

Getting Started
• Log in using your registered account.
• Ensure your device is connected to the internet.
• Verify that the fire detection device is powered on and connected to Firebase.
• After a successful connection, the dashboard will display live sensor data.

Dashboard
The dashboard displays:
• Current smoke level
• Temperature reading
• Flame detection status
• System status (Safe or Fire Detected)
• Last update time

A green status indicates the environment is safe, while a red status means a fire has been detected.

Real-Time Monitoring
The application continuously receives data from the fire detection device. Sensor readings are updated automatically without requiring manual refresh.

Notifications
When smoke, flame, or temperature exceeds the configured threshold:
• An alarm is triggered.
• A push notification is sent to your mobile device.
• An SMS alert is sent if SMS notifications are enabled.
• The dashboard status changes to Fire Detected.

Sensor Threshold Settings
You can customize detection sensitivity from the Settings page.
• Smoke Threshold: Sets the smoke level required to trigger an alert.
• Temperature Threshold: Sets the maximum safe temperature.
• Flame Detection: Enable or disable flame monitoring.
• Alarm Duration: Set how long the alarm will sound.
• Notification Settings: Enable or disable push notifications and SMS alerts.

Alert History
Open the History page to view all previous fire alerts, including:
• Date and time
• Sensor values
• Alert type
• Alert status

Profile
From the Profile page you can:
• Update your personal information.
• Change your password.
• Manage notification preferences.
• Log out securely.

Safety Tips
• Keep the fire detection device powered on at all times.
• Ensure a stable internet connection for real-time monitoring.
• Do not cover or block the smoke or flame sensors.
• Test the system regularly to ensure proper operation.
• Respond immediately whenever a fire alert is received.

Troubleshooting
No sensor data displayed:
1. Check the internet connection.
2. Verify the device is powered on.
3. Confirm Firebase is connected.

No notification received:
1. Enable notification permission in your phone settings.
2. Ensure internet access is available.
3. Verify notification settings inside the app.

False fire alerts:
1. Check if the sensor is installed near cooking smoke or chemicals.
2. Adjust the smoke sensitivity threshold if necessary.

Contact Support
If you experience any problems or need assistance, please contact the system administrator.
Email: ericksaimon97@gmail.com
Phone: +255 7442024

Thank you for using Fire Detection System. Your safety is our priority.
